metadata.title: Mandados — We make it happen
metadata.description: Mandados: fast, reliable and personalized deliveries and errands across Costa Rica. Order now — easy and transparent.
metadata.ogDescription: Mandados: fast, reliable and personalized deliveries and errands across Costa Rica.

hero.title: Ultra-fast deliveries and errands across Costa Rica
hero.description: Mandados handles shopping, deliveries and errands with trusted staff and personal attention. Order now and get clear updates at every step.
hero.cardSubtitle: Pickup: La Central supermarket • Drop-off: Office in Escazú

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Tailored solutions for individuals, businesses and events. Fast, reliable and fully tracked.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Clear rates based on distance and complexity. No surprises.

daily.title: Daily service
daily.note: For clients who need dedicated staff.

shoppingBilling.title: Shopping and billing
shoppingBilling.note: If Mandados does the shopping: weekly invoice (Fridays), 2% on shopping total + 13% VAT on the commission.

pricing.billingNote: Billing: weekly credit with invoice every Friday. Payment: bank transfer.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Write to us to request a service or a custom quote.
contact.success: Message sent. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.fixErrors: Please fix the errors in the form.
contact.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
